title: Add evidence-bound operator recall
goal: Create an episodic recall contract and exporter from receipts, PRs, Bureau tasks and friction records, optionally consumable by heimlern for offline learning.

acceptance.assertion: Recall item contract contains topic, situation, attempt, result, learned rule, evidence refs and does_not_establish entries.
Recall items cannot be created without at least one concrete evidence reference to receipt, PR, Bureau task or friction record.
Any heimlern integration is offline/proposal-only and cannot alter live routing, merge policy or task completion.
Focused tests cover valid recall, rejected free-form memory and missing-evidence failure.

metadata.non_goal: Does not create free-form chat memory or a policy oracle.
